_comment: Machine-readable companion to PORT_STATE.md, consumed by PortState.java. A calc path is considered ported iff it appears in 'ported' OR its 'paths' entry equals "ported". At v0.1.2 the PlayerVsNpcCalc.accuracy (player attack rolls), PlayerVsNpcCalc.defenceRoll (getNPCDefenceRoll + defence reductions), and PlayerVsNpcCalc.maxMeleeHit (getPlayerMaxMeleeHit + getMinAndMax melee dispatch) paths are ported, so the 3 maxAttackRoll rows, the 3 npcDefRoll rows, the 2 accuracy rows, and the 4 melee maxHit rows run; the 2 magic maxHit rows (maxMagicHit) still skip.
